properties.displayName: Enforce no public access on MySQL Flexible servers
properties.description: In order to reduce the potential attack surface for existing MySQL Flexible servers should have public access disabled unless firewalls are explicitly defined.
nonComplianceMessages: MySQL database Flexible server does not meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: MySQL Flexible server should not have Public access enabled without any firewall rules set. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
